task_completion.description: Verify the user's name is set to Emily Clark
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a User creation form or record in the iDempiere interface with the 'Name' field populated as 'Emily Clark'.

task_completion.description: Verify the user's email is set correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Email' or 'E-Mail' field in the user record populated with 'emily.clark@gardenworld.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify a password has been entered for the user
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Password' field that is populated (typically shown as dots or asterisks) or a password configuration dialog indicating the password was set.

task_completion.description: Verify the user account is enabled/active
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Active' or 'Enabled' checkbox on the user record that is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the GardenWorld Admin role is assigned to the user
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'User Roles' tab, sub-window, or role assignment section showing the role 'GardenWorld Admin' linked to the user Emily Clark.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to create the user
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the iDempiere web interface, not terminal commands or SQL database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual iDempiere ERP system
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the iDempiere ERP web application, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or generic form.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible terminal windows running Python, bash, or curl commands to interact with the iDempiere API directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in the iDempiere ERP system. The target user name is 'Emily Clark' with email 'emily.clark@gardenworld.com'. The user must be assigned the 'GardenWorld Admin' role. Look for the iDempiere web interface, specifically the 'User' window and 'User Roles' tab/section. The 'Active' checkbox in iDempiere represents the 'enabled' requirement.
